{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Visiri system
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Visiri system]] is choked with debris.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
